---
id: list-active-calls-for-phone-control
title: "List active calls for phone control"
description: "Returns the extension's current FreeSWITCH calls and their states. Use"
sidebar_label: "List active calls for phone control"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List active calls for phone control"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/phone-control/calls"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the extension's current FreeSWITCH calls and their states. Use
this before or after an action to confirm whether a call is `RINGING`,
`ACTIVE`, or `HELD`. An empty `data` array means there are no calls.

Access rules:
- Caller must have access to the target domain.
- Caller must have the `phone_control_view` permission.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"extension","description":"Extension number to inspect.","example":"1001","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Extension number to inspect.","example":"1001"}},{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
